amended_provisions: Unit 12 has been acquired by eminent domain by the Jamie J. Noe of Lee Q. Doe to 33 M.R.S. § 1601-107(a), Unit 12's allocated interests are reallocated to the remaining Units in proportion to the respective allocated interests of those Units before the taking, as set forth in the amended Exhibit B attached, and the remnant of Unit 12 is hereafter a common element.

touches_1602_117d.author: Reviewing Attorney
touches_1602_117d.basis: the amendment changes allocated interests, a § 1602-117(d) act, but is expressly required by § 1601-107(a) — the expressly-permitted-or-required carve-out applies
